characters.name: Pan
characters.description: PanBiographyOccupationScientistAlien InvaderResides inKarate StarPersonalAgeUnknownBirthdayUnknownGenderFemaleRelativesKeito (Eldest sister)Tsuu (Youngest sister)Shihan (Father)Shinano (Mother)ProductionVoiced byYoko HikasaFirst AppearanceSave The Galactic Crisis Zo! Alien Invader Tsuu (Youngest sister) She is smart, prideful and brave scientist who also a tsundere, meaning that she can act moody at times, but also has a much nicer demeaner to others. She loves to build all types of robots, mecha and other gadgets.
characters.personality_section: She is smart, prideful and brave scientist who also a tsundere, meaning that she can act moody at times, but also has a much nicer demeaner to others. She loves to build all types of robots, mecha and other gadgets.
